commands.purpose: Print AuditRegistry contents: every #[Auditable] model + configured $auditEncrypted + $auditExclude.
Run VerifyAuditChainJob synchronously (small tenants) or dispatch (large). --tenant scopes to one; --sample-tenants picks N random tenants for spot-check.
CLI trigger for ExportAuditForDsarJob. --format json (structured) or csv (Excel-friendly). Refused unless super_admin or dpo role.
Trigger RotateAuditColdStorageJob. --dry-run reports counts without rotating.
